name: com.eldritchgames.eldritchlogger
description: A configurable logging framework for Unity featuring structured log levels, category-based filtering, and color-coded output. Includes ScriptableObject-driven settings with quick presets, per-category toggles, and advanced options like custom timestamp formats and message prefixes. The custom editor provides live previews, color indicators, and one-click configuration for development, QA, and production environments.

author.name: Carlos Alberto Garcia de Alba Chavez

samples.description: Demonstrates how to initialize and use EldritchLogger with presets, categories, and advanced formatting.
